title: PRISM team config
description: Per-team config for token substitution and tech-stack-conditional content. Lives at .ai-skills/config.json in the consumer's repo. The onboarding flow (Atlas, Phase 2) writes this; agents read from it at chat time when behavior depends on tech stack.

org.description: Display org name. Used in PR descriptions, changelog headers, etc.

ticketPrefix.description: Ticket ID prefix used in branch names, commits, and PR titles.

ticketSystem.description: Ticket system configuration. Today only `kind: "linear"` is supported, but the object shape is the abstraction lever for future Jira/GitHub Issues.

kind.description: Ticket system provider. Linear is the only supported value today.

projectId.description: Linear project UUID, if scoped to a single project.

teamKey.description: Linear team key. Often matches ticketPrefix.

github.description: GitHub repo info for Eric (PR review), Sage (changelog), Reese (QA plans), Lilac (standup).

defaultBranch.description: Default branch name. Most teams use `main`.

techStack.description: Tech stack flags. Skills and rules branch on this — e.g. `use-effect-guidelines.md` only ships if `react` is present. Validated against an enum so the set stays curated; add new values to the enum when a real team needs them.

rules.description: Rule selection. `universal` is the always-included set; `optIn` adds tech-stack-specific rules.

optIn.description: Names of opt-in rule files (without .md extension).

slackChannel.description: Optional Slack channel for Lilac standup posting.
